tasks.title: Scale PostgreSQL Cluster and Configure Backups
subtasks: Scale CloudNative-PG 'sigma1-postgres' from 1 to 3 replicas.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling for 'sigma1-postgres'.
Configure automated daily backups for 'sigma1-postgres' with WAL archiving to S3.

tasks.title: Scale Redis/Valkey Cluster and Configure Maxmemory
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel for 'sigma1-valkey' with 3 replicas.
Configure an appropriate maxmemory policy for the 'sigma1-valkey' cluster.

tasks.title: Implement TLS Certificates via cert-manager
subtasks: Deploy cert-manager into the cluster.
Configure a ClusterIssuer for Let's Encrypt (or internal CA).
Issue TLS certificates for application ingress points.

tasks.title: Configure Ingress Controller
subtasks: Deploy an Ingress controller (e.g., NGINX or Envoy) into the cluster.
Configure Ingress resources for application services in the 'sigma1' namespace.

tasks.title: Configure CDN for Static Assets
subtasks: Integrate Cloudflare CDN with the 'sigma1-assets' S3/R2 bucket.
Configure caching rules and edge optimizations for static assets served via Cloudflare.

tasks.title: Implement Network Policies
subtasks: Define and apply Kubernetes Network Policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic within the 'sigma1' namespace.
Define and apply Kubernetes Network Policies to restrict traffic between 'sigma1' and 'databases' namespaces to only necessary ports and services.

tasks.title: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector into the cluster.
Configure OpenTelemetry Collector with appropriate sampling rates for traces and metrics.

tasks.title: Deploy Jaeger for Trace Storage
subtasks: Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage for traces.
Configure Jaeger to receive traces from the OpenTelemetry Collector.

tasks.title: Configure Alert Rules for SLO Violations
subtasks: Define alert rules based on application SLOs (e.g., latency, error rate, availability).
Integrate alert rules with an alerting system (e.g., Prometheus Alertmanager).
